stem: A digital marketing study surveys 500 users shown the ad and observes 117 positive outcomes out of 500 (23.4%). Estimate the true click-through rate and provide a 95% confidence interval.

ground_truth.answer: Sample proportion: 0.234. Wilson 95% CI: [0.199, 0.2731]. Point estimate: 0.236.

common_failure_modes: Using the Wald interval (p̂ ± z√(p̂(1-p̂)/n)) which performs poorly for small samples
Not reporting the confidence interval alongside the point estimate
